code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut current = ""
  mut have = false
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    let is_sign_start = (b == 45 or b == 43) and not have
    let is_digit = b >= 48 and b <= 57
    if is_sign_start or is_digit
      current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      have = true
    else
      if have
        match string.parse_int(current)
        when Some(v)
          result = list.push(result, v)
        when None
          ()
        end
        current = ""
        have = false
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if have
    match string.parse_int(current)
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let nums = parse_ints(line1)
let target = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
when Some(v)
  v
when None
  0
end

let n = nums.len()
mut i = 0
mut found = false
mut fi = 0
mut fj = 0
while i < n and not found
  mut j = i + 1
  while j < n and not found
    let a = match nums.get(i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    let b = match nums.get(j)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if a + b == target
      fi = i
      fj = j
      found = true
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if found
  println("found=#{fi},#{fj}")
else
  println("none")
end
